lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋੁਲਿ ਅਮੋੁਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਣਜਿ ਨ ਲੀਜੈ ਹਾਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: moul amoul na paaeeai vanaj na leejai haatt |
lines.english: Priceless virtues are not obtained for any price; they cannot be purchased in a store.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਤੇ ਗੁਣ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun te gun mil paaeeai je satigur maeh samaae |
lines.english: Meeting with a virtuous person, virtue is obtained, and one is immersed in the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਤੋਲੁ ਹੈ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਾਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak pooraa tol hai kabahu na hovai ghaatt |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, their weight is full and perfect; it never decreases at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਭਰਮਸਹਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: naam vihoone bharamaseh aaveh jaaveh neet |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they wander around, continually coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਬਾਂਧੇ ਇਕਿ ਢੀਲਿਆ ਇਕਿ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik baandhe ik dteeliaa ik sukhee har preet |
lines.english: Some are in bondage, and some are set free; some are happy in the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa man lai sach karanee sach reet |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, believe in the True Lord, and practice Truth, through the lifestyle of Truth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਗੜੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa bhram garr kattiaa mohu lobh ahankaaraa |
lines.english: I have cut down the fortress of duality and doubt, attachment, greed and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਤਿ ਖੜਗੁ ਕਰਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur te giaan paaeaa at kharrag karaaraa |
lines.english: From the Guru, I have obtained the supremely powerful sword of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਲਗਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach sanjam mat aootamaa har lagaa piaaraa |
lines.english: Through Truth, self-discipline and sublime understanding, the Lord has become very dear to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam man vasiaa gur sabad veechaaraa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord abides within my mind; I contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh sacho sach varatadaa sach sirajanahaaraa |1|
lines.english: Truly, truly, the True Creator Lord is all-pervading. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਦਾਰਾ ਰਾਗਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦੇ ਕਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kedaaraa raagaa vich jaaneeai bhaaee sabade kare piaar |
lines.english: Among the ragas, Kaydaaraa Raga is known as good, O Siblings of Destiny, if through it, one comes to love the Word of the Shabad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਮਿਲਦੋ ਰਹੈ ਸਚੇ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat siau milado rahai sache dhare piaar |
lines.english: and if one remains in the Soceity of the Saints, and enshrines love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਮਲੁ ਕਟੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਕੁਲਾ ਕਾ ਕਰੇ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: vichahu mal katte aapanee kulaa kaa kare udhaar |
lines.english: Such a person washes away the pollution from within, and saves his generations as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਾ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਅਵਗਣ ਕਢੈ ਵਿਡਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gunaa kee raas sangrahai avagan kadtai viddaar |
lines.english: He gathes in the capital of virtue, and destroys and drives out unvirtuous sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਗੁਰੂ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਨ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak miliaa so jaaneeai guroo na chhoddai aapanaa doojai na dhare piaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is known as united, who does not forsake his Guru, and who does not love duality. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰੁ ਦੇਖਉ ਡਰਿ ਮਰਉ ਭੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਡਰੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: saagar dekhau ddar mrau bhai terai ddar naeh |
lines.english: Gazing upon the world-ocean, I am afraid of death; but if I live in the Fear of You, God, then I am not afraid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਗਸਾ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad santokheea naanak bigasaa naae |2|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I am content; O Nanak, I blossom forth in the Name. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੜਿ ਬੋਹਿਥੈ ਚਾਲਸਉ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਲਹਰੀ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: charr bohithai chaalsau saagar laharee dee |
lines.english: I get on board the boat and set out, but the ocean is churning with waves.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕ ਨ ਸਚੈ ਬੋਹਿਥੈ ਜੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੀਰਕ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: tthaak na sachai bohithai je gur dheerak dee |
lines.english: The boat of Truth encounters no obstruction, if the Guru gives encouragement.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਦਰਗਹ ਚਲੈ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai daragah chalai maan |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, if I am blessed with His Grace, I shall go to His Court with honor. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਉਤਾਰੀਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਸਾਵਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tit dar jaae utaareea gur disai saavadhaan |
lines.english: He takes us across to the door on the other side, as the Guru keeps watch.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਬੈਠਾ ਨਿਆਉ ਕਰਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachai takhat baitthaa niaau kar satasangat mel milaaee |
lines.english: Sitting upon the throne of Truth, the Lord administers justice; He unites us in Union with the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਕੰਟਕ ਰਾਜੁ ਭੁੰਚਿ ਤੂ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nihakanttak raaj bhunch too guramukh sach kamaaee |
lines.english: Enjoy your kingdom of bliss; as Gurmukh, practice Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਅੰਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aithai sukhadaataa man vasai ant hoe sakhaaee |
lines.english: If the Lord, the Giver of peace, abides in the mind, in this world, then in the end, He becomes our help and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa upades har jaapanaa har siau ban aaee |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, through the True Teachings, we become just like the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੀ ਭੂਲੀ ਮੈ ਫਿਰੀ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਕਹੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolee bhoolee mai firee paadhar kahai na koe |
lines.english: Confused and deluded, I wander around, but no one shows me the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਊਪਜੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har siau preet aoopajee gur sojhee paaee |2|
lines.english: Love for the Lord wells up, when the Guru imparts understanding. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਛਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਸਿਆਣਿਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਾਟੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: poochhahu jaae siaaniaa dukh kaattai meraa koe |
lines.english: I go and ask the clever people, if there is there anyone who can rid me of my pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਉਤ ਹੀ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saachaa man vasai saajan ut hee tthaae |
lines.english: If the True Guru abides within my mind, then I see the Lord, my best friend, there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੀਐ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak man tripataaseeai sifatee saachai naae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, my mind is satisfied and fulfilled, contemplating the Praises of the True Name. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਰ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape karanee kaar aap aape kare rajaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Doer, and He is the deed; He Himself issues the Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੇ ਦੁਖ ਬਿਖੁ ਜਾਲੀ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak chaanan gur mile dukh bikh jaalee naae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, receiving the Divine Light from the Guru, suffering and corruption are burnt away, through the Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape kis hee bakhas le aape kaar kamaae |
lines.english: He Himself forgives some, and He Himself does the deed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਵੇਖਿ ਨ ਭੁਲੁ ਤੂ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਰਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa vekh na bhul too manamukh moorakhaa |
lines.english: Don't be fooled by gazing at the riches of Maya, you foolish self-willed manmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਸਭੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਦਰਬੁ ਲਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa naal na chalee sabh jhootth darab lakhaa |
lines.english: It shall not go along with you when you must depart; all the wealth you see is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਈ ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਮ ਖੜਗੁ ਕਲਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: agiaanee andh na boojhee sir aoopar jam kharrag kalakhaa |
lines.english: The blind and ignorant do not understand, that the sword of death is hanging over their heads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ubare jin har ras chakhaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, those who drink in the sublime essence of the Lord are saved.
